verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I'm tossed on life's sea and the waves cover me And the dark clouds won't let the sunshine through Then a voice seems to say, "Child, there'll be brighter day Don't allow the storm to hide sweet Heaven's view."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause you've got one more valley, one more hill And you got one more trial, one more tear One more curve in life's road, one more mile left to go You can lay down your heavy load when you get home.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now, don't let Satan see your tears, learn to smile through your fears Hold your head up high and give the world a smile You just be grateful everyday, its gonna be worth it all one day 'Cause it all will be over after while.
